title: E-commerce Behavioral Analysis
tagline: From a 1,438-person survey to a commercial intelligence framework — how platform time, age, and social media decode online purchase decisions
summary: A published IoB paper and extended data analysis born from the behavioral psychology research track. The same pan-India survey of 1,438 consumers that validated behavioral theory became a lens for e-commerce intelligence: platform-specific purchase triggers, Diwali seasonality, demographic spend patterns, and the commercial value of social media session depth.
